portal.title: RAHJ AI
portal.subtitle: Your ERP assistant portal — guidance and answers tailored to this system.
portal.chat_subheading: Same thread continues in the side panel if you open it from here or elsewhere.
portal.reply_pending: The assistant backend is not connected yet — your message is saved in this session only.
portal.composer_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
portal.suggestion_reports: How do I open inventory reports?
portal.suggestion_navigation: Where do I add a supplier or customer?
portal.suggestion_capabilities: What can RAHJ AI help with?
portal.card_what_body: A dedicated space for help with forms, reports, and workflows. Step-by-step guidance will connect here in a later phase.
portal.card_privacy_body: When live features are enabled, answers will respect your company, location, and permissions — same as the rest of the ERP.
portal.empty_hint: Guidance and smart replies will appear here once the assistant is connected.
